products.title: Romantic Red Rose Bouquet
products.description: A stunning bouquet of 24 premium red roses, perfect for expressing love and passion. Hand-selected fresh roses arranged with elegant greenery and wrapped in luxury paper.

reviews.comment: Absolutely gorgeous! My wife loved them!
Great quality but a bit pricey

products.title: Elegant White Lily Bouquet
products.description: Pure white lilies symbolizing elegance and grace. This bouquet features 12 pristine white lilies with baby's breath and eucalyptus leaves.

reviews.comment: Beautiful but arrived with one damaged lily

products.title: Sunshine Mixed Flower Bouquet
products.description: Brighten someone's day with this cheerful mix of sunflowers, yellow roses, and orange gerberas. A burst of sunshine in floral form!

products.title: Pastel Dreams Bouquet
products.description: Soft pastel pink and lavender roses mixed with delicate baby's breath. Perfect for baby showers, birthdays, or any gentle celebration.

reviews.comment: Perfect for my daughter's baby shower!

products.title: Wildflower Meadow Bouquet
products.description: A rustic arrangement of seasonal wildflowers including daisies, cornflowers, and chamomile. Brings the beauty of nature indoors.

products.title: Luxury Rose Flower Box
products.description: Premium preserved roses arranged in an elegant square box. These roses last for up to a year with no water needed. Available in black luxury packaging.

products.title: Heart-Shaped Rose Box
products.description: Romantic heart-shaped box filled with fresh red and pink roses. Perfect for Valentine's Day, anniversaries, or expressing your love.

reviews.comment: My girlfriend cried tears of joy!

products.title: Modern Orchid Flower Box
products.description: Elegant white and purple orchids arranged in a sleek modern box. A sophisticated gift that brings long-lasting beauty.

products.title: Rainbow Tulip Flower Box
products.description: A vibrant collection of rainbow-colored tulips in a chic white box. Includes red, yellow, pink, purple, and white tulips for a cheerful display.

products.title: Peony Paradise Flower Box
products.description: Luxurious pink and white peonies in a premium velvet-lined box. These stunning blooms are perfect for weddings and special occasions.

reviews.comment: Most beautiful peonies I've ever seen!

products.title: Succulent Garden Shelf
products.description: A beautiful arrangement of assorted succulents on a rustic wooden shelf. Low maintenance and perfect for home or office decor.

products.title: Herb Garden Shelf Set
products.description: A three-tier shelf with basil, rosemary, thyme, and mint plants. Fresh herbs for your kitchen, beautifully displayed.

reviews.comment: Good quality but needs frequent watering

products.title: Orchid Display Shelf
products.description: Elegant white metal shelf featuring three potted orchid plants. Modern design perfect for contemporary home decor.

reviews.comment: Looks amazing in my living room!

products.title: Bonsai Tree Shelf Collection
products.description: Three carefully cultivated bonsai trees on a bamboo shelf. Includes juniper, ficus, and jade varieties with care instructions.

products.title: Air Plant Wall Shelf
products.description: Geometric wall-mounted shelf with six air plants. No soil needed, minimal care required. Perfect for small spaces.

products.title: Spring Flower Basket
products.description: A charming wicker basket filled with tulips, daffodils, and hyacinths. The essence of spring in a beautiful arrangement.

products.title: Get Well Soon Flower Basket
products.description: Cheerful basket with bright gerberas, carnations, and greenery. Designed to lift spirits and bring comfort.

products.title: Sympathy White Flower Basket
products.description: Peaceful arrangement of white roses, lilies, and chrysanthemums in a classic basket. Express your condolences with grace.

products.title: Birthday Celebration Basket
products.description: Festive basket bursting with colorful roses, lilies, and alstroemeria. Includes a birthday balloon and ribbons.

products.title: Garden Fresh Flower Basket
products.description: Rustic basket with a cottage garden mix of lavender, roses, and seasonal blooms. Straight from the garden feel.

products.title: Romance & Chocolate Gift Combo
products.description: Luxury gift set featuring a dozen red roses with premium Belgian chocolates in an elegant presentation box.

products.title: Flowers & Wine Celebration Set
products.description: Beautiful mixed bouquet paired with a bottle of premium champagne. Perfect for celebrations and special occasions.

products.title: Spa & Flowers Relaxation Set
products.description: Pampering gift set with fresh flowers, scented candles, bath salts, and a plush robe. Ultimate relaxation package.

products.title: Coffee & Blooms Morning Set
products.description: Energizing combo of fresh flowers with gourmet coffee beans, ceramic mug, and artisan cookies.

products.title: Tea & Flowers Serenity Set
products.description: Calming collection featuring herbal tea assortment, honey, teapot, and a beautiful flower arrangement.

products.title: Premium Peony Bouquet
products.description: Exquisite bouquet of coral and blush peonies. These lush blooms are arranged to showcase their natural beauty.

products.title: Tropical Paradise Bouquet
products.description: Exotic arrangement of bird of paradise, anthuriums, and tropical foliage. Brings island vibes to any space.

products.title: Lavender Dreams Flower Box
products.description: Soothing arrangement of lavender roses and purple stock in a square box. Calming and romantic.

products.title: Cactus & Succulent Shelf Garden
products.description: Desert-themed arrangement featuring various cacti and succulents on a two-tier wooden shelf. Drought-resistant and stylish.

products.title: New Baby Flowers & Teddy Bear Set
products.description: Adorable gift combo featuring pastel flowers in a basket with a plush teddy bear and baby-themed card.
